title: Ordering Food Delivery by Phone
summary: Emma calls a pizza restaurant to order food for delivery, giving her order, address, payment method, and delivery time.

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: Good evening, Tony's Pizza. How can I help you?

body.speaker: Emma
body.text: Hi, I'd like to order some food for delivery, please.

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: Of course. What would you like to order?

body.speaker: Emma
body.text: I'd like one large pepperoni pizza and a small salad.

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: Sure. Would you like anything to drink with that?

body.speaker: Emma
body.text: Yes, please. Can I have two bottles of lemonade?

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: No problem. Can I have your delivery address, please?

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: Got it. How would you like to pay, by card or cash?

body.speaker: Emma
body.text: I'll pay by card when the food arrives.

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: Perfect. Your total is twenty-four dollars.

body.speaker: Emma
body.text: Okay. How long will the delivery take?

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: It should arrive in about thirty minutes.

body.speaker: Emma
body.text: Great, thank you so much. See you soon!

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Good evening, Tony's Pizza. How can I help you?
sentences.translationVi: Chào buổi tối, Tony's Pizza đây. Tôi có thể giúp gì cho bạn?

sentences.speaker: Emma
sentences.text: Hi, I'd like to order some food for delivery, please.
sentences.translationVi: Chào, tôi muốn đặt ít đồ ăn giao tận nơi ạ.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Of course. What would you like to order?
sentences.translationVi: Tất nhiên rồi. Bạn muốn đặt món gì ạ?

sentences.speaker: Emma
sentences.text: I'd like one large pepperoni pizza and a small salad.
sentences.translationVi: Tôi muốn một chiếc pizza pepperoni cỡ lớn và một phần salad nhỏ.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Sure. Would you like anything to drink with that?
sentences.translationVi: Được ạ. Bạn có muốn dùng kèm thức uống gì không?

sentences.speaker: Emma
sentences.text: Yes, please. Can I have two bottles of lemonade?
sentences.translationVi: Có ạ. Cho tôi hai chai nước chanh được không?

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: No problem. Can I have your delivery address, please?
sentences.translationVi: Không vấn đề gì. Cho tôi xin địa chỉ giao hàng của bạn nhé?

sentences.speaker: Emma
sentences.translationVi: Đó là số 42 đường Maple, căn hộ 3B.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Got it. How would you like to pay, by card or cash?
sentences.translationVi: Đã rõ. Bạn muốn thanh toán bằng thẻ hay tiền mặt?

sentences.speaker: Emma
sentences.text: I'll pay by card when the food arrives.
sentences.translationVi: Tôi sẽ trả bằng thẻ khi đồ ăn đến.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Perfect. Your total is twenty-four dollars.
sentences.translationVi: Tuyệt vời. Tổng cộng của bạn là hai mươi tư đô la.

sentences.speaker: Emma
sentences.text: Okay. How long will the delivery take?
sentences.translationVi: Được rồi. Giao hàng mất bao lâu vậy?

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: It should arrive in about thirty minutes.
sentences.translationVi: Dự kiến sẽ đến trong khoảng ba mươi phút.

sentences.speaker: Emma
sentences.text: Great, thank you so much. See you soon!
sentences.translationVi: Tuyệt, cảm ơn bạn rất nhiều. Hẹn gặp lại sớm nhé!

annotations.meaningVi: Tôi có thể giúp gì cho bạn?

annotations.exampleEn: I'd like to order some food for delivery, please.
I'd like to order some food for delivery, please.

annotations.phrase: What would you like to order?
annotations.exampleEn: What would you like to order?
I'd like one large pepperoni pizza and a small salad.
Would you like anything to drink with that?

annotations.meaningVi: Cho tôi xin / Tôi có thể lấy
annotations.exampleEn: Can I have two bottles of lemonade?
Can I have two bottles of lemonade?
Can I have your delivery address, please?

annotations.phrase: How would you like to pay
annotations.meaningVi: Bạn muốn thanh toán bằng cách nào
annotations.exampleEn: How would you like to pay, by card or cash?
How would you like to pay, by card or cash?
I'll pay by card when the food arrives.

annotations.phrase: How long will the delivery take?
annotations.exampleEn: How long will the delivery take?
It should arrive in about thirty minutes.

grammarNotes.title: Polite requests with 'I'd like' and 'Can I have'
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Khi đặt món, dùng 'I'd like + danh từ' hoặc 'Can I have + danh từ?' để yêu cầu một cách lịch sự. Ví dụ: 'I'd like one large pepperoni pizza' và 'Can I have two bottles of lemonade?'
grammarNotes.bodyEn: When ordering, use 'I'd like + noun' or 'Can I have + noun?' to make a polite request. Example: 'I'd like one large pepperoni pizza' and 'Can I have two bottles of lemonade?'

grammarNotes.title: Future with 'will' for predictions and decisions
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'will' để nói về quyết định tức thời hoặc dự đoán về tương lai. Ví dụ: 'I'll pay by card' (quyết định) và 'How long will the delivery take?' (dự đoán).
grammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'will' for instant decisions or predictions about the future. Example: 'I'll pay by card' (decision) and 'How long will the delivery take?' (prediction).

Emma: Tôi muốn một chiếc pizza pepperoni cỡ lớn và một phần salad nhỏ. Brian: Được ạ. Bạn có muốn dùng kèm thức uống gì không? Emma: Có ạ. Cho tôi hai chai nước chanh được không? Brian: Không vấn đề gì. Cho tôi xin địa chỉ giao hàng của bạn nhé? Emma: Đó là số 42 đường Maple, căn hộ 3B. Brian: Đã rõ. Bạn muốn thanh toán bằng thẻ hay tiền mặt? Emma: Tôi sẽ trả bằng thẻ khi đồ ăn đến. Brian: Tuyệt vời. Tổng cộng của bạn là hai mươi tư đô la. Emma: Được rồi. Giao hàng mất bao lâu vậy? Brian: Dự kiến sẽ đến trong khoảng ba mươi phút. Emma: Tuyệt, cảm ơn bạn rất nhiều. Hẹn gặp lại sớm nhé!
criticalThinkingQuestion: Do you prefer ordering food by phone or through an app, and what are the advantages of each?
